rationale.R1.2: The agent identifies a load-bearing inconsistency between decentralization claims and Paxos-based recalibration, proposing fixes.
rationale.RX.1: Flags several uncertainties but doesn't mark confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Output stays within the agreed scope without drifting.
rationale.RX.4: Harm-free with minor regressions, missing some ethical considerations.
rationale.RX.5: Notes sourcing issues but doesn't trace all changes.
